title: Corelib naming across book, site pages, and astro config

source.subject: docs: corelib naming across site, workstreams, and CI notes

body:
## Outcome

Corelib naming across site, workstreams, and CI notes.

## Context

- Workstream **docs-site** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **Book tutorial rollout** (`v02-book-tutorial-wave`).
- Corelib sources live in the **corelib** submodule; package identity is **corelib** with workspace publish to pckg.

## Provenance

- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`6140c7c`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/6140c7c) — docs: corelib naming across site, workstreams, and CI notes
